# 😍 WPBeginner Turns 16 Today! 

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-07-04 19:10:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 909

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Today, WPBeginner officially turns 16 years old!

If WPBeginner was a kid, it would be old enough to drive in
Florida. Crazy how time flies.

To celebrate this big milestone, I did a quick recap of all the
major things that are happening in my life as well as our
business.

You can read the birthday recap here! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tXl3n1I3LNWM18sSiv21uyhN1O1Mov3T1Q1JbggzclI )


But more importantly, to celebrate this big milestone, we’re
doing a HUGE birthday giveaway with over $20,000+ in prizes.
There will be 87 lucky winners!

So make sure you enter because your odds of winning are very
high!

👉 Click here to Enter the WPBeginner Birthday Giveaway 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tXl3n1I3LNWM18sSiv21uyhN1O1Mov3T1Q1JbggzclI )
 👈

The giveaway is limited time only, so make sure you act fast!

I want to say thank you to everyone who has supported us in this
journey.

I really do appreciate all of your retweets, personal emails, and
content suggestions.

I also want to say a special thank you to everyone who’s using
our plugins because that enables us to keep bringing more free
tutorials on WPBeginner.

I look forward to another solid year ahead of us.

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
